name: skills
description: A personal collection of [agent skills](https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/claude-code/skills) - reusable, self-contained instruction sets that an AI agent loads on demand to perform a specific task well and consistently. They follow the portable `SKILL.md` format, so they work across agent harnesses (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, OpenCode, and others), not a single tool.
